scripts.postinstall: rm -rf libs/@pablovaz && mkdir -p libs/@pablovaz && cp -RL node_modules/@pablovaz/. libs/@pablovaz && rm -rf libs/@pablovaz/*/.git libs/@pablovaz/*/.github libs/@pablovaz/*/node_modules
scripts.postinstall.bkp: mkdir -p libs/@pablovaz && [ -d node_modules/@pablovaz ] && cp -RL node_modules/@pablovaz/. libs/@pablovaz || true
